title: Bench quick JSON emits a passing summary
input: Run `orca bench --quick --json` and verify the JSON output reports three quick scenarios and a perfect score.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; node dist/bin/orca.js bench --quick --json'
